titleStmt.title: SII 24.484: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 484. (A.R. No. 57 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers an endowment in money made by Perumāḷ-Jīyar with the interest on which offerings were to be made to god Śrīraṅganātha, on the occasion of the sacred bath of the deity in the Kāvēri on the Paṅguṉi-Uttiram day during the annual festival (Ādi-Brahmāvin-tirunāḷ) in the temple. The donor's share of the offerings was assigned to Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-Jīyar alias Sēnāpatidhurandhara alias Śrīraṅganārāyaṇa-Jīyar. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1487, Krōdhana, Kaṉṉi, śu. 3, Thursday, Vaiśākha correspond to 1565 A.D., September 27, Thursday, ·50; ·55.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran śrīvirapradāpa śrīvirasadāśivarāyamahārāyar pṛthivīrājyam
paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 8 10 7 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa kuṟodhana samvatsarattu kaṉṉi nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tritikaiyum
bṛhaspativāramum peṟṟa viśākha nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiya kulapativaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāvītivaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppati
perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa jīyyarāṉa śrīman senāpati dhurandhararāna śrīraṅganārāyaṇajiyyar śrīpāta
ttil perumāḷ jiyyareṉ deṇṭan samarppittup poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Ātibrahmāvin tirunāḷ Oṉpatān tiru
nāḷ paṅkuṉi Uttirattukku tīrtthanayiṉār vaṭakkut tirukkāveriyil Eḻuntaruḷi tirumañcanam koṇṭaruḷi Aṭiyenuṭaiya Ubhaiyamāka
Amutu ceytaruḷum kaṭṭaḷaikku śrīpaṇṭārattil mutaliṭṭa poṉ 5 10 Intap poṉ Aṉpatukku māsam 1- kku vaṭṭi paṇam nūṟṟukku
p paṇam Oṉṟāka vaṭṭiyil kūṭiṉatu māsam 1- kku U 5 Āka varuṣam 1- kku poṉ 6 Intappoṉ Āṟukku Ātibrahmāvin tirunāḷ Āṉa pattāntirunāḷ
paṅkuṉi Uttirak kaṭṭaḷaikku tīrttha nayiṉār vaṭatiruk kāveriil Eḻuntaruḷi tirumaiñcaṉam koṇṭaruḷiṉa piṟaku Amutu ceytaruḷum cema
ttaḷikai 2¥ vaṭai 5 10 1¥ tocai 5 10 1¥ teṅkāy Iḷaṉīr paḻam Āka Iṉta vakai varuṣam varuṣam toṟum Eḻuntaruḷi Amutu cey
taruḷi Intap poliyūṭṭukkaṭṭaḷai cantrātityavaraiyum naṭattak kaṭavatākavum . Itukaḷukku varum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa jiyya
rāṉa śrīman senāpati dhurandhararāna śrīraṅganārāyaṇa jiyyare candrāditya- varaiyum peṟṟu varakkaṭavarākavum . dāna pālanayonmaddhye dā
nāt śreyo3pālanam . dānāt svarggamavāpnoti pālanādaccutam padam . Ippaṭikku Intappoliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku
koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅkanārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu ..śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 24.484 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
